f1105
f1106
features.source:
def f1106(s, a):
    try:
        r = int(a[0]); c = int(a[1])
    except:
        return False
    h = len(s); w = len(s[0]) if h else 0
    if not (0 <= r < h and 0 <= c < w): return False
    # Find rfts.AGENT position
    for rr in range(h):
        for cc in range(w):
            if s[rr][cc] == rfts.AGENT:
                br, bc = rr, cc
                break
        else: continue
        break
    else: return False
    dr = r - br
    dc = c - bc
    if dr != -dc or dr <= 0: return False
    # Check all cells between (rfts.AGENT) and (r,c) along (1,-1)
    for k in range(1, dr):
        rr = br + k
        cc = bc - k
        if not (0 <= rr < h and 0 <= cc < w): return False
        if s[rr][cc] not in [rfts.AGENT, s[r][c]]: return False
    return True

features.name: f1117
features.source:
def f1117(s, a):
    try:
        r = int(a[0]); c = int(a[1])
    except:
        return False
    h = len(s); w = len(s[0]) if h else 0
    if not (0 <= r < h and 0 <= c < w): return False
    # Find rfts.STAR position
    for rr in range(h):
        for cc in range(w):
            if s[rr][cc] == rfts.STAR:
                br, bc = rr, cc
                break
        else: continue
        break
    else: return False
    dr = r - br
    dc = c - bc
    if dr != -dc or dr <= 0: return False
    # Check all cells between (rfts.STAR) and (r,c) along (1,-1)
    for k in range(1, dr):
        rr = br + k
        cc = bc - k
        if not (0 <= rr < h and 0 <= cc < w): return False
        if s[rr][cc] not in [rfts.DRAWN, s[r][c]]: return False
    return True
